function.name: PCAP_WritePDU
function.signature: static int PCAP_WritePDU(const uint8_t *PDU, unsigned int length)

bug.description: scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority

prompt:
There is a scheduling priority inversion where lower-priority traffic is served before higher-priority downstream of function PCAP_WritePDU in the openair2/UTIL/OPT subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/UTIL/OPT/probe.c:143.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
